original_query: select      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     hd_vehicle_count,     count(*) as cnt from     store_sales,     web_sales,     date_dim d1,     date_dim d2,     customer,     inventory,     store,     warehouse,     item,     customer_demographics,     household_demographics,     customer_address     where       ss_item_sk = i_item_sk       and ws_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk       and ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 			and d2.d_date between d1.d_date and (d1.d_date + interval '30' day)       and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk       and inv_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and inv_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk       and inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss_quantity       and s_state = w_state       AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')       and i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)       and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk       and c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk       and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk       and ca_state in ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')       and d1.d_year = 2001       and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100     group by cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count     order by cnt     ;
rewritten_query:
SELECT
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    hd_vehicle_count,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM store_sales
JOIN item ON store_sales.ss_item_sk = item.i_item_sk
JOIN web_sales ON web_sales.ws_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN inventory ON inventory.inv_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
    AND inventory.inv_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    AND inventory.inv_warehouse_sk = web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk
JOIN warehouse ON web_sales.ws_warehouse_sk = warehouse.w_warehouse_sk
JOIN store ON store.s_state = warehouse.w_state
JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
JOIN household_demographics ON customer.c_current_hdemo_sk = household_demographics.hd_demo_sk
JOIN customer_address ON customer.c_current_addr_sk = customer_address.ca_address_sk
WHERE d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
    AND inventory.inv_quantity_on_hand >= store_sales.ss_quantity
    AND item.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND item.i_manager_id IN (3, 15, 17, 26, 43, 44, 55, 70, 82, 95)
    AND customer_address.ca_state IN ('IN', 'LA', 'NE', 'NM', 'OH')
    AND d1.d_year = 2001
    AND web_sales.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100
GROUP BY cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY cnt;

Combine join conditions between store_sales and web_sales to reduce redundant joins, directly linking them on both item_sk and customer_sk.
Make the inventory join explicitly connected to both store_sales (on item and date) and web_sales (on warehouse), which might help in using indexes or more efficient join methods.

original_query: select      cd_gender,     cd_marital_status,     cd_education_status,     hd_vehicle_count,     count(*) as cnt from     store_sales,     web_sales,     date_dim d1,     date_dim d2,     customer,     inventory,     store,     warehouse,     item,     customer_demographics,     household_demographics,     customer_address     where       ss_item_sk = i_item_sk       and ws_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk       and ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 			and d2.d_date between d1.d_date and (d1.d_date + interval '30' day)       and ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk       and ws_warehouse_sk = w_warehouse_sk       and inv_item_sk = ss_item_sk       and inv_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk       and inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss_quantity       and s_state = w_state       AND i_category IN ('Electronics', 'Jewelry', 'Music')       and i_manager_id IN (6, 10, 21, 31, 34, 57, 70, 73, 85, 96)       and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk       and c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk       and c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk       and ca_state in ('FL', 'MO', 'PA', 'SC', 'TX')       and d1.d_year = 2001       and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 31 AND 51     group by cd_gender, cd_marital_status, cd_education_status, hd_vehicle_count     order by cnt     ;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk, i_category, i_manager_id
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Electronics', 'Jewelry', 'Music')
    AND i_manager_id IN (6, 10, 21, 31, 34, 57, 70, 73, 85, 96)
),
filtered_dates_d1 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001
),
filtered_addresses AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk, ca_state
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('FL', 'MO', 'PA', 'SC', 'TX')
)
SELECT 
    cd.cd_gender, 
    cd.cd_marital_status, 
    cd.cd_education_status, 
    hd.hd_vehicle_count, 
    COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM 
    store_sales ss
INNER JOIN filtered_items i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN filtered_dates_d1 d1 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN inventory inv ON ss.ss_item_sk = inv.inv_item_sk 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = inv.inv_date_sk 
    AND inv.inv_quantity_on_hand >= ss.ss_quantity
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk 
    AND inv.inv_warehouse_sk = ws.ws_warehouse_sk
    AND ws.ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 31 AND 51
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk 
    AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + INTERVAL '30' DAY)
INNER JOIN warehouse w ON ws.ws_warehouse_sk = w.w_warehouse_sk
INNER JOIN store s ON s.s_state = w.w_state
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
    AND ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN filtered_addresses ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN household_demographics hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
GROUP BY 
    cd.cd_gender, 
    cd.cd_marital_status, 
    cd.cd_education_status, 
    hd.hd_vehicle_count
ORDER BY 
    cnt;

original_query: with customer_total_return as (select sr_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk as ctr_store_sk ,sr_reason_sk as ctr_reason_sk ,sum(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) as ctr_total_return from store_returns ,date_dim where sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_year =2001 and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 236 and 295 group by sr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk)  select  c_customer_id from customer_total_return ctr1 ,store ,customer ,customer_demographics where ctr1.ctr_total_return > (select avg(ctr_total_return)*1.2 from customer_total_return ctr2 where ctr1.ctr_store_sk = ctr2.ctr_store_sk ) and ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31 and s_store_sk = ctr1.ctr_store_sk and s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI') and ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk and cd_marital_status IN ('W', 'W') and cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College') and cd_gender = 'M' and c_birth_month = 5 and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956 order by c_customer_id limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_store_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk, SR_REFUNDED_CASH
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND sr_return_quantity > 0
      AND sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity BETWEEN 236 AND 295
      AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 28 AND 31
),
customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
           sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
           sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
           SUM(SR_REFUNDED_CASH) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM filtered_store_returns
    GROUP BY sr_customer_sk, sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk
),
store_averages AS (
    SELECT ctr_store_sk,
           AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS avg_total
    FROM customer_total_return
    GROUP BY ctr_store_sk
),
filtered_customers AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_current_cdemo_sk
    FROM customer
    WHERE c_birth_month = 5
      AND c_birth_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 1956
)
SELECT c_customer_id
FROM customer_total_return ctr1
JOIN store_averages sa ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sa.ctr_store_sk
JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk AND store.s_state IN ('MI', 'NC', 'WI')
JOIN filtered_customers c ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN customer_demographics cd ON c.c_current_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
WHERE ctr1.ctr_total_return > sa.avg_total
  AND cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
  AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('4 yr Degree', 'College')
  AND cd.cd_gender = 'M'
ORDER BY c_customer_id
LIMIT 100;

original_query: with customer_total_return as (select sr_customer_sk as ctr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk as ctr_store_sk ,sr_reason_sk as ctr_reason_sk ,sum(SR_RETURN_AMT) as ctr_total_return from store_returns ,date_dim where sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk and d_year =2001 and sr_return_amt / sr_return_quantity between 182 and 241 group by sr_customer_sk ,sr_store_sk, sr_reason_sk)  select  c_customer_id from customer_total_return ctr1 ,store ,customer ,customer_demographics where ctr1.ctr_total_return > (select avg(ctr_total_return)*1.2 from customer_total_return ctr2 where ctr1.ctr_store_sk = ctr2.ctr_store_sk ) and ctr1.ctr_reason_sk BETWEEN 24 AND 27 and s_store_sk = ctr1.ctr_store_sk and s_state IN ('IA', 'NE', 'TX') and ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = c_customer_sk and c_current_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk and cd_marital_status IN ('S', 'U') and cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree') and cd_gender = 'F' and c_birth_month = 6 and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1934 AND 1940 order by c_customer_id limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH customer_total_return AS (
    SELECT 
        sr_customer_sk AS ctr_customer_sk,
        sr_store_sk AS ctr_store_sk,
        sr_reason_sk AS ctr_reason_sk,
        SUM(SR_RETURN_AMT) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM 
        store_returns 
        JOIN date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d_year = 2001
        AND sr_return_amt >= 182 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_return_amt <= 241 * sr_return_quantity
        AND sr_reason_sk BETWEEN 24 AND 27
    GROUP BY 
        sr_customer_sk, 
        sr_store_sk, 
        sr_reason_sk
), 
store_avg_return AS (
    SELECT 
        ctr_store_sk,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) * 1.2 AS threshold_return
    FROM 
        customer_total_return
    GROUP BY 
        ctr_store_sk
)
SELECT 
    c_customer_id 
FROM 
    customer_total_return ctr1
    JOIN store_avg_return sar ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = sar.ctr_store_sk
    JOIN store ON ctr1.ctr_store_sk = store.s_store_sk
    JOIN customer ON ctr1.ctr_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics ON customer.c_current_cdemo_sk = customer_demographics.cd_demo_sk
WHERE 
    ctr1.ctr_total_return > sar.threshold_return
    AND store.s_state IN ('IA', 'NE', 'TX') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_marital_status IN ('S', 'U') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_education_status IN ('Secondary', '4 yr Degree') 
    AND customer_demographics.cd_gender = 'F' 
    AND customer.c_birth_month = 6 
    AND customer.c_birth_year BETWEEN 1934 AND 1940 
ORDER BY 
    c_customer_id 
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number) FROM store_sales, store_returns, web_sales, date_dim d1, date_dim d2, item, customer, customer_address, household_demographics WHERE ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number AND ss_customer_sk = ws_bill_customer_sk AND ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk AND c_current_addr_sk = ca_address_sk AND c_current_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk AND sr_item_sk = ws_item_sk AND i_item_sk = ss_item_sk AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports') AND sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk AND ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk AND d2.d_date between d1.d_date AND (d1.d_date + interval '90' day) AND ca_state in ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR') AND d1.d_year = 1999 AND hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20 AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000' AND ss_sales_price / ss_list_price BETWEEN 80 * 0.01 AND 100 * 0.01 ;
rewritten_query:
WITH d1_filtered AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_date + INTERVAL '90' DAY AS end_date
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1999
),
item_filtered AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Books', 'Shoes', 'Sports')
),
hd_filtered AS (
    SELECT hd_demo_sk
    FROM household_demographics
    WHERE hd_income_band_sk BETWEEN 14 AND 20
    AND hd_buy_potential = '5001-10000'
),
ca_filtered AS (
    SELECT ca_address_sk
    FROM customer_address
    WHERE ca_state IN ('IN', 'MT', 'NM', 'OH', 'OR')
)
SELECT min(c_customer_sk), min(ss_item_sk), min(sr_ticket_number), min(ws_order_number)
FROM store_returns sr
INNER JOIN d1_filtered d1 ON sr.sr_returned_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
INNER JOIN item_filtered i ON sr.sr_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
INNER JOIN store_sales ss ON sr.sr_item_sk = ss.ss_item_sk
                          AND sr.sr_ticket_number = ss.ss_ticket_number
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price >= 0.80 * ss.ss_list_price
                          AND ss.ss_sales_price <= 1.00 * ss.ss_list_price
INNER JOIN customer c ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
INNER JOIN ca_filtered ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
INNER JOIN hd_filtered hd ON c.c_current_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
INNER JOIN web_sales ws ON ss.ss_customer_sk = ws.ws_bill_customer_sk
                        AND sr.sr_item_sk = ws.ws_item_sk
INNER JOIN date_dim d2 ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
                       AND d2.d_date BETWEEN d1.d_date AND d1.end_date;

rewritten_query:
WITH valid_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE i_category IN ('Children', 'Electronics', 'Home')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 68 AND 77
), 
valid_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 1998
      AND d_moy BETWEEN 7 AND 10
)
SELECT 
    cd_gender, 
    cd_marital_status, 
    cd_education_status, 
    count(*) cnt1, 
    cd_purchase_estimate, 
    count(*) cnt2, 
    cd_credit_rating, 
    count(*) cnt3, 
    cd_dep_count, 
    count(*) cnt4, 
    cd_dep_employed_count, 
    count(*) cnt5, 
    cd_dep_college_count, 
    count(*) cnt6
FROM 
    customer c
    JOIN customer_address ca ON c.c_current_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON cd.cd_demo_sk = c.c_current_cdemo_sk
WHERE 
    ca.ca_county IN ('Benton County','Clarke County','La Paz County','Lexington city','Power County')
    AND c.c_birth_month IN (9, 11)
    AND cd.cd_marital_status IN ('D', 'W', 'M')
    AND cd.cd_education_status IN ('Unknown', 'College')
    AND cd.cd_gender = 'F'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM store_sales ss
        JOIN valid_dates ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN valid_items ON ss.ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
        WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
          AND ss.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 0.90 * ss.ss_list_price AND ss.ss_list_price
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM (
            SELECT ws_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk
            FROM web_sales
            JOIN valid_dates ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            JOIN valid_items ON ws_item_sk = i_item_sk
            WHERE ws_sales_price BETWEEN 0.90 * ws_list_price AND ws_list_price
            
            UNION ALL
            
            SELECT cs_ship_customer_sk
            FROM catalog_sales
            JOIN valid_dates ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            JOIN valid_items ON cs_item_sk = i_item_sk
            WHERE cs_sales_price BETWEEN 0.90 * cs_list_price AND cs_list_price
        ) sales
        WHERE sales.customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    )
GROUP BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
ORDER BY 
    cd_gender,
    cd_marital_status,
    cd_education_status,
    cd_purchase_estimate,
    cd_credit_rating,
    cd_dep_count,
    cd_dep_employed_count,
    cd_dep_college_count
LIMIT 100;

       AVG(ss_ext_sales_price),
       AVG(ss_ext_wholesale_cost),
       SUM(ss_ext_wholesale_cost)

  )

      (ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA') AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200)

rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_ss AS (
    SELECT ss.ss_quantity, 
           ss.ss_ext_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
           ss.ss_cdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_hdemo_sk, 
           ss.ss_addr_sk,
           ss.ss_sales_price, 
           ss.ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN store s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    WHERE d.d_year = 2001
)
SELECT MIN(ss_quantity) AS min_ss_quantity,
       MIN(ss_ext_sales_price) AS min_ss_ext_sales_price,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
       MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost_dup
FROM (
    -- Scenario 1
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'U'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 3
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('IN', 'NM', 'VA')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 2
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'W'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = '2 yr Degree'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('MT', 'OH', 'OR')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Scenario 3
    SELECT f.ss_quantity, f.ss_ext_sales_price, f.ss_ext_wholesale_cost
    FROM filtered_ss f
    JOIN customer_demographics cd ON f.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
    JOIN household_demographics hd ON f.ss_hdemo_sk = hd.hd_demo_sk
    JOIN customer_address ca ON f.ss_addr_sk = ca.ca_address_sk
    WHERE cd.cd_marital_status = 'S'
      AND cd.cd_education_status = 'College'
      AND hd.hd_dep_count = 1
      AND f.ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00
      AND ca.ca_country = 'United States'
      AND ca.ca_state IN ('GA', 'IL', 'TX')
      AND f.ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250
) AS combined

    MIN(ss_quantity) AS min_ss_quantity,
    MIN(ss_ext_sales_price) AS min_ss_ext_sales_price,
    MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost,
    MIN(ss_ext_wholesale_cost) AS min_ss_ext_wholesale_cost_duplicate

    household_demographics ON hd_demo_sk = ss_hdemo_sk

    customer_address ON ca_address_sk = ss_addr_sk

    d_year = 2001
    AND (
        (
            cd_marital_status = 'U' 
            AND cd_education_status = 'College' 
            AND (
                (ss_sales_price BETWEEN 100.00 AND 150.00 AND hd_dep_count = 3)
                OR 
                (ss_sales_price BETWEEN 50.00 AND 100.00 AND hd_dep_count = 1)
            )
        )
        OR 
        (
            cd_marital_status = 'S' 
            AND cd_education_status = 'Secondary' 
            AND ss_sales_price BETWEEN 150.00 AND 200.00 
            AND hd_dep_count = 1
        )
    )
    AND ca_country = 'United States'
    AND (
        (
            ca_state IN ('AR', 'OK', 'TX') 
            AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 100 AND 200
        )
        OR 
        (
            ca_state IN ('KS', 'MN', 'TX') 
            AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 150 AND 300
        )
        OR 
        (
            ca_state IN ('KS', 'MD', 'NV') 
            AND ss_net_profit BETWEEN 50 AND 250
        )
    );

rewritten_query:
WITH cross_items_source AS (
    SELECT iss.i_brand_id AS brand_id, iss.i_class_id AS class_id, iss.i_category_id AS category_id, 'store' AS source
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN item iss ON ss_item_sk = iss.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
    WHERE d1.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
      AND iss.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND iss.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ics.i_brand_id, ics.i_class_id, ics.i_category_id, 'catalog' AS source
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN item ics ON cs_item_sk = ics.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE d2.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
      AND ics.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND ics.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
    UNION ALL
    SELECT iws.i_brand_id, iws.i_class_id, iws.i_category_id, 'web' AS source
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN item iws ON ws_item_sk = iws.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d3 ON ws_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    WHERE d3.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
      AND iws.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND iws.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
),
cross_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk AS ss_item_sk
    FROM item
    WHERE (i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id) IN (
        SELECT brand_id, class_id, category_id
        FROM cross_items_source
        GROUP BY brand_id, class_id, category_id
        HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT source) = 3
    )
    AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
),
avg_sales AS (
    SELECT avg(quantity*list_price) average_sales
    FROM (
        SELECT ss_quantity quantity, ss_list_price list_price
        FROM store_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
          AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
        UNION ALL
        SELECT cs_quantity quantity, cs_list_price list_price
        FROM catalog_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
          AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
        UNION ALL
        SELECT ws_quantity quantity, ws_list_price list_price
        FROM web_sales
        JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
          AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
    ) x
),
week_seqs AS (
    SELECT 
        (SELECT d_week_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1998 AND d_moy = 12 AND d_dom = 13) AS week_seq_1998,
        (SELECT d_week_seq FROM date_dim WHERE d_year = 1999 AND d_moy = 12 AND d_dom = 13) AS week_seq_1999
),
sales_combined AS (
    SELECT 
        'store' AS channel,
        i.i_brand_id,
        i.i_class_id,
        i.i_category_id,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1999 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) AS ty_sales,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1999 THEN 1 END) AS ty_number_sales,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1998 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) AS ly_sales,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1998 THEN 1 END) AS ly_number_sales
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN item i ON ss.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
    CROSS JOIN week_seqs ws
    WHERE ss.ss_item_sk IN (SELECT ss_item_sk FROM cross_items)
      AND i.i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
      AND i.i_manager_id BETWEEN 14 AND 23
      AND ss.ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 78 AND 98
      AND d.d_week_seq IN (ws.week_seq_1998, ws.week_seq_1999)
    GROUP BY i.i_brand_id, i.i_class_id, i.i_category_id
    HAVING 
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1999 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) > (SELECT average_sales FROM avg_sales)
        AND SUM(CASE WHEN d.d_week_seq = ws.week_seq_1998 THEN ss_quantity * ss_list_price ELSE 0 END) > (SELECT average_sales FROM avg_sales)
)
SELECT 
    channel AS ty_channel,
    i_brand_id AS ty_brand,
    i_class_id AS ty_class,
    i_category_id AS ty_category,
    ty_sales,
    ty_number_sales,
    channel AS ly_channel,
    i_brand_id AS ly_brand,
    i_class_id AS ly_class,
    i_category_id AS ly_category,
    ly_sales,
    ly_number_sales
FROM sales_combined
ORDER BY channel, i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
LIMIT 100;

Combine the this_year and last_year subqueries into a single query using conditional aggregation. This reduces redundant scans and joins by processing both years' data in a single pass, using CASE statements to separate the metrics by year.
Precompute week sequence values for specific dates in a separate CTE (week_seqs) to avoid redundant date lookups.

WITH cross_items AS (
    SELECT i_item_sk ss_item_sk
    FROM item,
         (SELECT iss.i_brand_id brand_id,
                 iss.i_class_id class_id,
                 iss.i_category_id category_id
          FROM store_sales,
               item iss,
               date_dim d1
          WHERE ss_item_sk = iss.i_item_sk
            AND ss_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
            AND d1.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
            AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
            AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
            AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
          INTERSECT
          SELECT ics.i_brand_id,
                 ics.i_class_id,
                 ics.i_category_id
          FROM catalog_sales,
               item ics,
               date_dim d2
          WHERE cs_item_sk = ics.i_item_sk
            AND cs_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
            AND d2.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
            AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
            AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
            AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
          INTERSECT
          SELECT iws.i_brand_id,
                 iws.i_class_id,
                 iws.i_category_id
          FROM web_sales,
               item iws,
               date_dim d3
          WHERE ws_item_sk = iws.i_item_sk
            AND ws_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
            AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
            AND d3.d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000) x
    WHERE i_brand_id = brand_id
      AND i_class_id = class_id
      AND i_category_id = category_id
      AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
),
avg_sales AS (
    SELECT AVG(quantity * list_price) average_sales
    FROM (SELECT ss_quantity quantity,
                 ss_list_price list_price
          FROM store_sales,
               date_dim
          WHERE ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            AND d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
            AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
          UNION ALL
          SELECT cs_quantity quantity,
                 cs_list_price list_price
          FROM catalog_sales,
               date_dim
          WHERE cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            AND d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000
            AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
          UNION ALL
          SELECT ws_quantity quantity,
                 ws_list_price list_price
          FROM web_sales,
               date_dim
          WHERE ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
            AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
            AND d_year BETWEEN 1998 AND 2000) x
)
SELECT this_year.channel ty_channel,
       this_year.i_brand_id ty_brand,
       this_year.i_class_id ty_class,
       this_year.i_category_id ty_category,
       this_year.sales ty_sales,
       this_year.number_sales ty_number_sales,
       last_year.channel ly_channel,
       last_year.i_brand_id ly_brand,
       last_year.i_class_id ly_class,
       last_year.i_category_id ly_category,
       last_year.sales ly_sales,
       last_year.number_sales ly_number_sales
FROM (SELECT 'store' channel,
             i_brand_id,
             i_class_id,
             i_category_id,
             SUM(ss_quantity * ss_list_price) sales,
             COUNT(*) number_sales
      FROM store_sales,
           item,
           date_dim
      WHERE ss_item_sk IN (SELECT ss_item_sk FROM cross_items)
        AND ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
        AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        AND d_week_seq = (SELECT d_week_seq
                          FROM date_dim
                          WHERE d_year = 1999
                            AND d_moy = 12
                            AND d_dom = 9)
        AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
        AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
      GROUP BY i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id

     (SELECT 'store' channel,
             i_brand_id,

             i_category_id,
             SUM(ss_quantity * ss_list_price) sales,
             COUNT(*) number_sales

      WHERE ss_item_sk IN (SELECT ss_item_sk FROM cross_items)
        AND ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
        AND ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        AND d_week_seq = (SELECT d_week_seq
                          FROM date_dim
                          WHERE d_year = 1998
                            AND d_moy = 12
                            AND d_dom = 9)
        AND i_category IN ('Children', 'Men', 'Women')
        AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 43
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 49 AND 58
      GROUP BY i_brand_id, i_class_id, i_category_id
      HAVING SUM(ss_quantity * ss_list_price) > (SELECT average_sales FROM avg_sales)) last_year
WHERE this_year.i_brand_id = last_year.i_brand_id
  AND this_year.i_class_id = last_year.i_class_id
  AND this_year.i_category_id = last_year.i_category_id

original_query: with frequent_ss_items as  (select substring(i_item_desc,1,30) itemdesc,i_item_sk item_sk,d_date solddate,count(*) cnt   from store_sales       ,date_dim       ,item   where ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk     and ss_item_sk = i_item_sk     and d_year = 2001     and i_manager_id BETWEEN 77 and 96      AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Jewelry', 'Sports')   group by substring(i_item_desc,1,30),i_item_sk,d_date   having count(*) >4),  max_store_sales as  (select max(csales) tpcds_cmax   from (select c_customer_sk,sum(ss_quantity*ss_sales_price) csales         from store_sales             ,customer             ,date_dim         where ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk          and ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk          and d_year = 2001          and ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12         group by c_customer_sk) tmp1),  best_ss_customer as  (select c_customer_sk,sum(ss_quantity*ss_sales_price) ssales   from store_sales       ,customer   where ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk   and c_birth_year BETWEEN 1977 AND 1983   group by c_customer_sk   having sum(ss_quantity*ss_sales_price) > (95/100.0) * (select   * from  max_store_sales))   select  sum(sales)  from (select cs_quantity*cs_list_price sales        from catalog_sales            ,date_dim        where d_year = 2001          and d_moy = 10          and cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk          and cs_item_sk in (select item_sk from frequent_ss_items)          and cs_bill_customer_sk in (select c_customer_sk from best_ss_customer)          and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12       union all       select ws_quantity*ws_list_price sales        from web_sales            ,date_dim        where d_year = 2001          and d_moy = 10          and ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk          and ws_item_sk in (select item_sk from frequent_ss_items)          and ws_bill_customer_sk in (select c_customer_sk from best_ss_customer)          and ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12) tmp2  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH frequent_ss_items AS (
    SELECT substring(i_item_desc,1,30) AS itemdesc, i_item_sk AS item_sk, d_date AS solddate
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 77 AND 96
      AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Jewelry', 'Sports')
    GROUP BY i_item_sk, d_date, substring(i_item_desc,1,30)
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 4
),
max_store_sales AS (
    SELECT MAX(csales) AS tpcds_cmax
    FROM (
        SELECT c_customer_sk, SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) AS csales
        FROM store_sales
        JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2001
          AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
        GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    ) tmp1
),
best_ss_customer AS (
    SELECT c_customer_sk
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE c_birth_year BETWEEN 1977 AND 1983
      AND d_year = 2001
      AND ss_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
    GROUP BY c_customer_sk
    HAVING SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) > 0.95 * (SELECT tpcds_cmax FROM max_store_sales)
)
SELECT SUM(sales)
FROM (
    SELECT cs_quantity * cs_list_price AS sales
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN frequent_ss_items ON cs_item_sk = item_sk
    JOIN best_ss_customer ON cs_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND d_moy = 10
      AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ws_quantity * ws_list_price AS sales
    FROM web_sales
    JOIN date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN frequent_ss_items ON ws_item_sk = item_sk
    JOIN best_ss_customer ON ws_bill_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2001
      AND d_moy = 10
      AND ws_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 2 AND 12
) tmp2
LIMIT 100;

    SELECT 
        SUBSTRING(i_item_desc, 1, 30) AS itemdesc,
        i_item_sk AS item_sk,
        d_date AS solddate,
        COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM 
        store_sales
    JOIN 
        date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN 
        item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    WHERE 
        d_year = 1999
        AND i_manager_id BETWEEN 65 AND 84
        AND i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    GROUP BY 
        SUBSTRING(i_item_desc, 1, 30), i_item_sk, d_date
    HAVING 
        COUNT(*) > 4
), 
max_store_sales AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(csales) AS tpcds_cmax
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            c_customer_sk,
            SUM(ss_quantity * ss_sales_price) AS csales
        FROM 
            store_sales
        JOIN 
            customer ON ss_customer_sk = c_customer_sk
        JOIN 
            date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
        WHERE 
            d_year = 1999

    ) tmp1

best_ss_customer AS (
    SELECT

)
SELECT 
    SUM(sales) 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        cs_quantity * cs_list_price AS sales
    FROM 
        catalog_sales
    JOIN 
        date_dim ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    WHERE 
        d_year = 1999
        AND d_moy = 7
        AND cs_item_sk IN (SELECT item_sk FROM frequent_ss_items)
        AND cs_bill_customer_sk IN (SELECT c_customer_sk FROM best_ss_customer)
        AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 23 AND 33

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        ws_quantity * ws_list_price AS sales

        web_sales
    JOIN 
        date_dim ON ws_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk

        d_year = 1999
        AND d_moy = 7
        AND ws_item_sk IN (SELECT item_sk FROM frequent_ss_items)

original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,sum(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,sum(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,sum(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 8  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_dates_1 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy = 8 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_dates_2 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_moy BETWEEN 8 AND 10 AND d_year = 2001
),
filtered_sales AS (
    SELECT ss_customer_sk, ss_item_sk, ss_ticket_number, ss_store_sk, ss_net_profit
    FROM store_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_1 ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_returns AS (
    SELECT sr_customer_sk, sr_item_sk, sr_ticket_number, sr_net_loss
    FROM store_returns
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
),
filtered_catalog AS (
    SELECT cs_bill_customer_sk, cs_item_sk, cs_net_profit
    FROM catalog_sales
    JOIN filtered_dates_2 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
)
SELECT 
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    SUM(fs.ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
    SUM(fr.sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
    SUM(fc.cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM filtered_sales fs
JOIN filtered_returns fr ON fs.ss_customer_sk = fr.sr_customer_sk
    AND fs.ss_item_sk = fr.sr_item_sk
    AND fs.ss_ticket_number = fr.sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_catalog fc ON fr.sr_customer_sk = fc.cs_bill_customer_sk
    AND fr.sr_item_sk = fc.cs_item_sk
JOIN store s ON fs.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
JOIN item i ON fs.ss_item_sk = i.i_item_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,stddev_samp(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,stddev_samp(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,stddev_samp(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 4  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 4 and  4 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_sales_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy = 4
),
filtered_return_catalog_dates AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001 AND d_moy BETWEEN 4 AND 6
)
SELECT i_item_id,
       i_item_desc,
       s_store_id,
       s_store_name,
       stddev_samp(ss_net_profit) AS store_sales_profit,
       stddev_samp(sr_net_loss) AS store_returns_loss,
       stddev_samp(cs_net_profit) AS catalog_sales_profit
FROM store_sales
JOIN filtered_sales_dates d1 ON d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk
JOIN item ON i_item_sk = ss_item_sk
JOIN store ON s_store_sk = ss_store_sk
JOIN store_returns ON ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk
                   AND ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk
                   AND ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number
JOIN filtered_return_catalog_dates d2 ON sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN catalog_sales ON sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk
                   AND sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk
JOIN filtered_return_catalog_dates d3 ON cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
GROUP BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
ORDER BY i_item_id, i_item_desc, s_store_id, s_store_name
LIMIT 100;

       AVG(ss_coupon_amt) AS agg3,

FROM store_sales

),

)

    avg(ss.ss_quantity) as agg1,

    avg(ss.ss_coupon_amt) as agg3,
    avg(ss.ss_sales_price) as agg4
FROM store_sales ss
JOIN filtered_demographics cd ON ss.ss_cdemo_sk = cd.cd_demo_sk
JOIN filtered_dates d ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
JOIN filtered_stores s ON ss.ss_store_sk = s.s_store_sk
